overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from a third-person perspective showing two characters sitting on a ledge overlooking a snowy mountain village square. The clip features traditional Asian-inspired architecture with colorful banners, snow-capped mountains in the background, and ambient NPC activity in the plaza below.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy village square with traditional wooden architecture and mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: Two characters sitting on a stone ledge overlooking the village square, with the left character occasionally gesturing with their hand

notable_agents.action: villager in yellow robe standing still near the planter
pedestrian walking across the snowy plaza from left to right

entered.detail: multi-tiered traditional architecture with curved roofs and wooden facades forming the village backdrop
tall red and orange decorative banners hanging between structures in the plaza
snow-covered mountain peaks visible behind the village buildings under a clear sky
snow-dusted stone ledge where the two viewpoint characters are seated
large ornate planter with snow accumulation on its rim

segments.scene_description: A static third-person view from behind two seated characters overlooking a serene snowy village square. Traditional wooden buildings with colorful banners line the plaza, with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves through the square while the characters remain seated on a stone ledge, observing the peaceful winter scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, contemplative perspective from behind two seated characters overlooking a serene, snow-covered village square. It begins with a static view from a stone ledge, framing the characters as they observe the peaceful winter landscape. As the camera lingers, the focus expands to the traditional wooden buildings and colorful banners that line the plaza, contrasting with the stark white snow. The scene then settles on the distant, towering snow-capped mountains that anchor the horizon while sparse pedestrian traffic drifts quietly through the square below.
